openclaw.label: OpenClaw telemetry
openclaw.fallback: Seeded worker snapshot until a safe live socket bridge is wired
openclaw.note: Browser access stays client-side only, so live telemetry should be opt-in and connection-safe.

github.label: GitHub issues
github.fallback: Seeded issue snapshot until a safe read path exists
github.note: Do not hardcode a powerful token into the browser for private repo access.
